stage1.prompt: 选出 branch 的中文意思

learn.example: A bird is sitting on the branch.

stage1.prompt: 选出 root 的中文意思

learn.example: The tree's roots grow deep into the soil.

stage1.q: The ___ of a tree take in water from the soil.

learn.meaning: n. 根——树根从土壤中吸收水分
learn.example: Tree roots take in water and nutrients.

stage1.prompt: 选出 wood 的中文意思

learn.example: The table is made of wood.

stage1.prompt: 选出 stick 的中文意思

learn.example: He picked up a stick from the ground.

stage1.prompt: 选出 dig 的中文意思

learn.example: The dog is digging a hole in the garden.
The rabbit lives in a hole under the tree.

stage1.q: The tree has many ___ and deep ___.

learn.example: The tree has many branches and deep roots.

stage1.prompt: 选出 be made of 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 由……制成（能看出原材料）
learn.example: The chair is made of wood.

learn.meaning: phr. 由……制成（of 后接原材料，看得出原料）
learn.example: This bridge is made of stone.

stage1.q: 这棵树有粗壮的树枝和很深的根。
options: The tree has thick branch and deep root.
The tree has thick branches and deep roots.
The tree have thick branches and deep roots.
The tree has thick branchs and deep roots.

learn.meaning: gram. 三单主语 The tree，用 has；branches 复数加 -es
learn.example: The tree has thick branches and deep roots.

stage1.q: 这个洞是狗用棍子挖出来的。
options: The hole was digged by the dog with a stick.
The hole was dug by the dog with a stick.
The hole dug by the dog with a stick.
The hole was dig by the dog with a stick.

learn.meaning: gram. dig 过去式/过去分词都是 dug（不是 digged）
learn.example: The hole was dug by the dog.

stage2.prompt: 选出 oxygen 的中文意思

learn.example: Trees produce oxygen for us to breathe.
Trees help create a better environment.

stage2.prompt: 选出 environment 的中文意思

learn.example: We should protect the environment.

stage2.prompt: 选出 take in 的中文意思

learn.example: Trees take in carbon dioxide and give out oxygen.

stage2.prompt: 选出 greenhouse gas 的中文意思

learn.example: Carbon dioxide is a greenhouse gas.

stage2.prompt: 选出 human 的中文意思

learn.example: Humans need oxygen to live.
Plants take in CO₂ and give out O₂.

stage2.q: 树木吸收温室气体并制造氧气供人类呼吸。
options: Trees take in greenhouse gas and create oxygen for human to breathe.
Trees take in greenhouse gases and create oxygen for humans to breathe.
Trees take in greenhouse gases and create oxygen for humans breathe.
Trees takes in greenhouse gases and creates oxygen for humans to breathe.

learn.meaning: gram. for + 名词 + to do；humans 复数
learn.example: Trees create oxygen for humans to breathe.

stage2.prompt: 选出 come from 的中文意思

learn.example: Most of our wood comes from trees.

stage2.q: 首先，树木对环境非常重要。
options: To begin with, trees is very important for the environment.
To begin with, trees are very important to the environment.
To begin with, trees are very important for the environment.
To begin, trees are very important for the environment.

learn.word: to begin with / be important for
learn.meaning: phr. 首先；第一点（用 to begin with）；important for + 名词
learn.example: To begin with, trees are important for the environment.

stage2.prompt: 选出 to begin with 的中文意思

learn.example: To begin with, let's talk about why trees matter.

stage2.prompt: 选出 look around 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 环视；环顾；四下察看
learn.example: He looked around the forest and felt amazed.

stage3.prompt: 选出 convenient 的中文意思

learn.example: Online shopping is very convenient.

stage3.prompt: 选出 furniture 的中文意思

learn.example: We bought some new furniture for the living room.

stage3.prompt: 选出 furniture 的正确用法
stage3.q: There is ___ furniture in the room.

learn.meaning: gram. furniture 是不可数名词，不用 many/a few/several
learn.example: some furniture, a piece of furniture

stage3.prompt: 选出 product 的中文意思

learn.example: Wood can be made into many products.

stage3.prompt: 选出 be made of 和 be made from 的区别
stage3.q: Paper is made ___ wood. (看不出原料)

learn.meaning: phr. 由……制成（看不出原料）→ be made from
learn.example: Paper is made from wood. (看不出木头)

stage3.prompt: 选出 borrow 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 借；借用（借入 borrow from，借出 lend to）
learn.example: Can I borrow your pen?

stage3.prompt: 选出 side 的中文意思

learn.example: There is a door on the side of the house.

stage3.q: 这家商店的木制家具很方便购买。
options: The shop's wood furniture are convenient to buy.
The shop's wooden furniture is convenient to buy.
The shops wooden furniture is convenient to buying.
The shop's wooden furnitures are convenient to buy.

learn.meaning: gram. 木制的用 wooden；furniture 不可数，搭配 is
learn.example: The wooden furniture is beautiful.

stage3.q: She ___ a book from the library yesterday.

learn.meaning: v. 借入——从图书馆借书用 borrow；lend 是借出
learn.example: I borrowed a book from the library.

stage3.q: 例如，木制产品既美观又环保。
options: For example, wood products are both beautiful and environment-friendly.
For example, wooden products are both beautiful and environment-friendly.
For examples, wooden products are both beautiful and environmental-friendly.
For example, wooden product is both beautiful and environment-friendly.

learn.meaning: gram. for example（不加 s）；wooden 是形容词
learn.example: For example, wooden products are eco-friendly.

stage3.prompt: 选出 for example 的中文意思

learn.example: Many trees are important, for example, oaks and pines.

stage3.prompt: 选出 borrow 和 lend 的区别
stage3.q: Can you ___ me your pen? I forgot mine.

learn.meaning: gram. lend sb sth 借给某人某物；borrow sth from sb 向某人借
learn.example: Can you lend me your pen? = Can I borrow your pen?

stage4.prompt: 选出 silent 的中文意思

learn.example: He remained silent during the meeting.

stage4.prompt: 选出 overlook 的中文意思

learn.example: Don't overlook the small details.

stage4.prompt: 选出 communicate 的中文意思

learn.example: We communicate with each other every day.

stage4.prompt: 选出 communicate with 的中文意思

learn.example: Trees can communicate with each other through their roots.

stage4.prompt: 选出 knowledge 的中文意思

learn.example: Reading books increases our knowledge.

stage4.prompt: 选出 character 在句中的意思

learn.meaning: n. 文字（也可指性格、人物角色）
learn.example: Chinese characters are beautiful.

stage4.prompt: 选出 spread 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 传播（过去式也是 spread）
learn.example: News spread quickly through the village.

stage4.prompt: 选出 spread 的正确用法

learn.meaning: gram. spread 过去式也是 spread（不变）
learn.example: The news spread fast yesterday.

stage4.prompt: 选出 translation 的中文意思

learn.example: Can you read the English translation?

stage4.q: Trees can ___ with each other through roots.

learn.meaning: phr. 与……沟通（can 后接动词原形）
learn.example: Trees can communicate with each other.

stage4.q: 知识通过翻译和文字在世界各地传播。
options: Knowledge spreads around the world through translation and characters.
Knowledge spread around the world through translations and characters.
Knowledge spreads around the world through translations and character.
Knowledge is spread around the world through translation and characters.

learn.meaning: gram. knowledge 不可数，用三单 spreads；through 表示通过……方式
learn.example: Knowledge spreads through books and translations.

stage4.q: 不要忽略沉默的人，他们可能有很多知识。
options: Don't overlook the silent people — they may have many knowledge.
Don't overlook silent people — they may have much knowledge.
Don't overlooking silent people — they may have much knowledge.
Don't overlook silent people — they may have a knowledge.

learn.meaning: gram. Don't + 动词原形；knowledge 不可数，用 much
learn.example: Don't overlook silent people.

stage5.prompt: 选出 species 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 种；物种（单复数同形）
learn.example: There are many species of trees in the forest.

stage5.prompt: 选出 accident 的中文意思

learn.example: He found the treasure by accident.

stage5.prompt: 选出 by accident 的中文意思

learn.example: I met her by accident at the bookstore.

stage5.q: 据科学家所说，树木能通过根部互相交流。
options: According to scientists, trees can communicate with each other through roots.
According scientists, trees can communicate with each other through their roots.
According to scientists, trees can communicat with each other through their roots.
According to scientists, trees can communicate each other through their roots.

learn.meaning: gram. according to 据……所说；communicate 后必须加 with
learn.example: According to scientists, trees can communicate with each other.

stage5.prompt: 选出 according to 的中文意思

learn.example: According to the report, the forest is growing.

stage5.prompt: 选出 treat 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 以……态度对待；以……方式对待
learn.example: We should treat nature with respect.

stage5.q: 我们应该善待环境，而不是忽略它的重要性。
options: We should treat the environment good and not overlook its important.
We should treat the environment well and not overlook its importance.
We should treat the environment well and not overlooking its importance.
We should treat environment well and not overlook it's importance.

learn.meaning: gram. treat...well 善待；important 名词形式 importance
learn.example: We should treat nature well.

stage5.prompt: 选出 look around 的语境用法
stage5.q: When I entered the forest, I ___ and saw beautiful trees everywhere.

learn.meaning: phr. 环顾——进入森林后四下看
learn.example: I looked around and felt the beauty of nature.

stage5.q: 环顾四周，你会看到树木创造的美丽环境。
options: Look around, and you will see the beautiful environment create by trees.
Look around, and you will see the beautiful environment created by trees.
Looking around, and you will see the beautiful environment created by trees.
Look around, and you'll see the beautiful environment creating by trees.

learn.meaning: gram. 祈使句 Look around + and you will；created 过去分词表被动
learn.example: Look around, and you'll see the beauty created by nature.

stage5.prompt: 选出 call on 的中文意思

learn.example: The teacher called on students to plant more trees.

options: According to the study, trees absorb carbon dioxide and take in CO₂.
According to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorbs CO₂.
According to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorb CO₂.
Accordings to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorb CO₂.

learn.meaning: gram. according to 必须加 to；主语 trees 复数，动词 produce 和 absorb 都用原形
learn.example: According to the study, trees help clean the air.

stage5.prompt: 选出 species 的正确用法
stage5.q: Many ___ of plants live in this forest.

learn.meaning: gram. species 单数和复数形式一样，不加 -s 或 -es
learn.example: one species → many species
